description: Annual celebration of Tuscan wines with tastings from regional vineyards and food pairings. Masterclasses with sommeliers and winemakers.
Italy's oldest and most prestigious music festival featuring world-class opera ballet and symphonic concerts in historic Florentine venues.
International gelato competition and tasting event celebrating artisanal Italian ice cream. Multiple flavors from master gelato makers across Italy.
Prestigious classical music festival featuring renowned orchestras and soloists from around the world. Opens with performance of Smetana's Ma Vlast.
Traditional Christmas markets across Old Town Square and Wenceslas Square. Mulled wine trdelník pastries handcrafted gifts and festive atmosphere.
Spectacular light art festival transforming Prague's historic buildings and public spaces with interactive installations and projections.
One of Europe's oldest documentary and short film festivals. International screenings discussions and competitions in historic cinemas.
Week-long celebration of Jewish heritage with klezmer concerts workshops exhibitions and traditional food in historic Kazimierz district.
Atmospheric Christmas market in Main Market Square. Traditional Polish crafts ornaments mulled wine and regional specialties beneath the Cloth Hall.
Traditional Bavarian Christmas market at Neupfarrplatz. Handcrafted ornaments mulled wine bratwurst and festive atmosphere in medieval setting.
Traditional Bavarian folk festival with beer tents amusement rides local food and live music. Authentic regional celebration twice yearly.
Bavarian Jazz Week featuring international jazz artists in intimate venues across the Old Town. From traditional to contemporary jazz styles.
